name: Kuch Love Jaisa
overview: A girl meets a boy, both fell in love, and then live a happy ever afterlife. That's how most love stories flow. But what happens when every step of your love story is a challenge in itself. Meet Roshni and Shashank, two opposite personalities who after all odds grow feelings for each other. Stay tuned to be part of their journey and find out where this path of love takes them.

trailers.title: Kuch Love Jaisa - Official Trailer | Ft  Aadar Malik, Simran Kaur & Badri Chavan | Alright!
